beats.vo_text: Everybody wants the result. Nobody wants the process.
beats.staged_action: the man leans against a rum shop wall, watching tourists pass with shopping bags

beats.vo_text: I was the same way. Wanted the wealth without the work.
beats.staged_action: the man sits on the beach at dusk, staring at the horizon

beats.vo_text: I bought the course. I bought the tools. I skipped the reps.
beats.staged_action: the man at his desk, surrounded by unused notebooks and unopened courses

beats.vo_text: Then I realized: the process IS the result. There is no shortcut to reps.
beats.staged_action: the man picks up a single notebook and opens it to the first page

beats.vo_text: Do the work. The result follows the reps, not the wishing.
beats.staged_action: the man writes in the notebook, steady and focused

beats.vo_text: Start today. One rep at a time.
beats.staged_action: the man closes the notebook with a firm nod, stands up
